name: LLaMA Series (LLaMA, LLaMA 2, LLaMA 3)
training_approach: Unsupervised pretraining on publicly available data; LLaMA 2+ added RLHF fine-tuning
key_innovations: Demonstrated that open-weight models trained on public data can match proprietary models
Showed that smaller models trained on more tokens can outperform larger models trained on fewer tokens
Catalyzed the open-source LLM ecosystem — spawned hundreds of derivative models
LLaMA 3 405B approached GPT-4 level performance as a fully open-weight model
Grouped Query Attention (GQA) for efficient inference in LLaMA 2+
lineage_path: perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Transformer -> GPT-1 -> GPT-2 -> GPT-3 -> LLaMA -> LLaMA 2 -> LLaMA 3
cultural_impact: LLaMA democratized access to frontier-class language models. Meta's decision to release model weights under permissive licenses created an explosion of open-source AI development, challenging the closed-model paradigm of OpenAI and Anthropic. The LLaMA ecosystem became the foundation for thousands of fine-tuned models and research projects worldwide.
